pages.text: Infernal Equipment is created by enhancing Void technology with volatile materials found in the Nether. These items burn with unstable energy and grant their wielders immense destructive potential.

pages.title: Tools
pages.text: Infernal tools are capable of breaking materials that even Void tools struggle against. Their strength allows explorers to gather resources from deeper and more dangerous environments.

pages.title: Scythes
pages.text: Infernal Scythes are feared weapons capable of devastating attacks. The intense energy infused within them makes them especially effective against powerful enemies.

pages.title: Armor
pages.text: Infernal Armor is built to withstand the most extreme environments. Those who wear it can endure the dangers of both the Nether and the corrupted forces of the Void.
